rationale: Verified all four exported signatures unchanged: ScanOrphanedClosedBeads(specID, workdir, excludeBeadID string) ([]Orphan, error) and ClosedEpicBeadIDs(specID string) ([]string, error) in internal/lifecycle/orphans.go untouched by this delta; CheckPendingObligations(beadID string, getMeta func(string) (map[string]interface{}, error)) error and PanelGateRoots(root, wtPath, specID string) []string in panel_advisory.go byte-identical (diff e71a7991..a8da895a touches only lines 577-602, a new validation loop inserted between decodeRefutations and the len(pending)==0 early return; no signature line is in the diff hunk). uncoveredPendingObligations remains the single shared unexported core, same signature ([]uncoveredPendingEntry, error), called by both CheckPendingObligations (line 654) and reconcilePendingRefutations (line 721) -- reconcile calls the shared core directly, NOT the exported CheckPendingObligations predicate, confirmed via grep. Diff stat confirms scope: only internal/complete/panel_advisory.go (+27) and its _test.go (+71) changed -- no approve/gitutil/docs touched. Import block (encoding/json, fmt, io, os, sort, strconv, strings, time, executor/guard/panel/workspace) is untouched -- the added loop uses only fmt (already imported) and ranges over the already-decoded coveredRefuted slice. go build ./... and go vet ./internal/complete both clean. Worktree left clean per instructions.
